entities.name: CRISPR/CAS SYSTEM
entities.description: A powerful and highly precise gene-editing tool used for crop improvement programs.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of crops for better yield, quality, and stress tolerance.

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area.

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: The characteristics of a crop that determine its value or suitability for use.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL VALUE
entities.description: The content of essential nutrients in a crop.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL STRESSES
entities.description: External factors in the environment that negatively impact plant growth and development.

entities.name: CAS PROTEIN
entities.description: A protein with DNA endonuclease activity that is part of the CRISPR/Cas system.

entities.name: GUIDE RNAS
entities.description: Short RNA transcripts that direct the Cas protein to the target DNA sequence.

entities.name: EDITING EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The effectiveness and precision of the genome editing process.

entities.name: RNA POL III PROMOTERS
entities.description: Promoters that govern the expression levels of sgRNA in the CRISPR/Cas system.

entities.name: POL II PROMOTERS
entities.description: Promoters used for the transcription of protein-coding genes, compared here with Pol III promoters.

entities.name: SYNTHETIC PROMOTERS
entities.description: Artificially designed promoters used to increase targeting efficiency and overcome limitations of natural promoters.

entities.name: U6/U3 PROMOTERS
entities.description: Endogenous RNA Pol III promoters used to improve editing efficiency in plants.

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: A model plant used for genome editing research.

entities.name: TOBACCO
entities.description: A model plant used for genome editing research.

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: A group of grass crops grown for their edible seeds.

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of plants in the Fabaceae family used for crop improvement.

entities.name: OILSEED
entities.description: Crops grown primarily for the extraction of oil from their seeds.

entities.name: HORTICULTURAL CROPS
entities.description: Plants grown in gardens or orchards for food, medicinal, or ornamental purposes.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms such as pests or pathogens.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by non-living factors such as drought, salinity, or temperature.
